title: Celestial GUI
description:
Pretty blue-purple starry themed GUI pack!
Almost full overhaul of Minecraft gui!

Hey, I'm looking for someone to help with updating it for various versions of mc, as I can't do it on my own... DM me on discord! ar_aphelion
body:
**_Bright aesthetic Starry GUI pack^^_**
I like cute. Dazzly too. So here's cute and dazzly for you.
It's still in development.
Full overhaul of containers/GUI

Things left:
-boss bars
-gamemode switch
-advancements UI 
-hardcore hearts 
-horses hearts
